notableEvents.label: Bobby Witt Jr. reached on error

notableEvents.detail: Bobby Witt Jr. reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Junior Caminero.

notableEvents.label: Ben Williamson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ben Williamson pops out to first baseman Jac Caglianone in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda grounds into a double play, second baseman Michael Massey to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Jonny DeLuca to 3rd. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Jonathan Aranda out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jonathan Aranda rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonathan Aranda grounds into a double play, second baseman Michael Massey to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Jac Caglianone. Jonny DeLuca to 3rd. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Jonathan Aranda out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
